terms.definition: A free, browser-based hosted Jupyter notebook service running on Google's cloud, with optional GPU/TPU runtimes.
The hosted VM and hardware (CPU/GPU/TPU) executing a Colab notebook, selectable and ephemeral.
A temporary runtime whose filesystem and installed packages are reset when it disconnects.
Connecting Google Drive into the Colab filesystem (drive.mount) to persist files across sessions.
Colab's secure store for credentials like API keys, read at runtime via userdata.get instead of being saved in the notebook.
